subject: {{receiver.contact_name}}, your job has been successfully posted to Ideal4Finance

body.text: Hi {{receiver.contact_name}} - Your job has successfully been posted to Ideal4Finance.

rows.text: Now that you've told us about your job, you can sit back whilst we let our approved tradespeople know about the work you're looking to get done. Expect them to reach out in due course.

rows.subtext: We're here for you all the way. If you have any questions about the loan, or the job itself, please reach out to us using the contact information below.
